历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 30474 → 47926 → 54032 → 45276 → 45764. The ranking in 2021 was abnormally high, then significantly dropped in 2022–2023, stabilizing around 45,000–46,000 in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 45,764. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 36 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 52 in 2024, and 63 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 78, an increase of about 23.8% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion of admission slots, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it is approximately 131st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 129 and 163, placing it at a mid-to-lower level among 211 universities. No significant public opinion incidents were found in the university's reputation documents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 72nd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 380,000, indicating low-to-medium short video exposure and stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University did not have any disciplines rated A- or above, so its advantageous disciplines are relatively limited in strength, attracting average interest from high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category majors include Computer Science, Software Engineering, Automation, Mechanical Engineering, etc., among which Computer Science and Software Engineering are socially popular. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated 150,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 4.6% from 143,400 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, far from Liaoning, making it a remote cross-province university. Its enrollment proportion in Liaoning is not high, and regional preferences somewhat suppress the willingness of Liaoning candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 Physics Category enrollment expansion of about 23.8% (shifting rankings downward, easier admission), the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 4.6% (shifting rankings upward, harder admission), stable university reputation, and limited appeal due to remote location, the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by the candidate increase. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 52,353, with a range of 51,853–52,853.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<51,853), you can prioritize popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Software Engineering.
